case_title: JUN LI VS. HAIGANG GROUP INC.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR JUL-18-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-14-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-14-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY REBECCA CHAU--MANDARIN INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SHAOJUN LIU-MANDARIN INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, JUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAIGANG GROUP INC. D.B.A. CALIFORNIA TECHNOLOGY COLLEGE $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 5/15/12 TO DEFENDANT HAIGANG GROUP, INC., "NO SUCH ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD".

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2012 - CONTINUED TO SEP-05-2012 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 JUDGE PRO TEM NANCY NEWMAN. AN UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE BY HAIGANG GROUP, INC. IS GRANTED. TRIAL IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 05, 2012, CLERK TO GIVE NOTICE TO ALL PARTIES.
